race.comment: BOSSY NIC (3) has been rock-solid in both runs this prep and looks ideally placed to break through third-up. She boasts a strong record at the trip and only needs to hold her form to land the winning blow. AVIATRESS (1) resumes and returns to the home track after a Melbourne campaign that included a Listed victory. She's been tuned up with a sharp trial win and should make her presence felt back in familiar surroundings. NAIFAH (13) ran good time on speed when narrowly beaten by Torsheen first-up at Mornington. She'll take improvement from that effort and is set to give a bold sight again from the low draw. SIXTEEN REASONS (5) worked home well when resuming in the John Hawkes Stakes, finishing fourth at big odds after surprising the market. Drawn more favourably here and shouldn't be overlooked. FERIVIA (2) caught the eye charging through along the inside in the Tobin Bronze Stakes a fortnight ago and deserves much more respect this time around.
